Lemurian Gmurphy + เลือก 3:
Gmurphy - core dps (OE), sub dps support (E0-E3)
Tulu - support + Lemurian passive
Miryam - battery
Faros - consistency
Goliath - burst
-----------------------
Discard:
Corposant - core dps
Aurita - sub dps
Casiah (arc 2, sf) - consistency + ramp
Ramona - skey (3 cost)
Tulu - support
